calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sehr for Marvelle Carter.

The Court noted that a lot of time was spent on sale of the property. Counsel explained circumstances and the extent of services provided/time spent to support his fee request. The Court informed Counsel that it is inclined to cut extraordinary fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission subject to receipt of a declaration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
